authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the new JDK.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM from 1.3.5.RELEASE to 2.3.0.RELEASE to support Java 11 and modern Spring features.
Upgrade the Spring Cloud dependency management version from Brixton.RELEASE to Hoxton.SR4 to match the new Spring Boot version.
Replace the deprecated spring-cloud-starter-oauth2 with spring-security-oauth2-autoconfigure and spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server to align with Spring Security 5.x.

authorization/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Fix the wrapper JAR path to be relative to the project base directory instead of the current working directory.
